title: cynorkis subtilis
intro: Cynorkis subtilis, a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, is native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Cynorkis subtilis has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, cough, and sore throat, and is also valued for its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve overall cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Cynorkis subtilis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to apply the plant's medicinal properties directly to affected areas.
